body: Hi Suresh, regarding the corporate bulk thali package, our data shows IPL home-match Saturdays underperformed weeknight matches in metros recently. For corporate orders, weekdays might be a better bet. What do you think?
rationale: Connects research digest to merchant's planning intent for corporate thali.

body: Hi Padma, regarding your kids yoga summer camp idea: Our data shows the post-Jan resolution window is closing, with trial walk-ins peaking in the last two weeks. This is a prime time to capture interest. Given your high retention and active planning signals, focusing on a structured program now could be very effective.
rationale: Addresses merchant's planning intent for kids yoga camp, referencing relevant data.

body: Hi Aditya, just a reminder about your appointment tomorrow at Karim's Salon. We're looking forward to seeing you!
rationale: Appointment reminder for Aditya tomorrow at Karim's Salon.

body: नमस्ते Riya, कल Beauty Lounge by Renu में आपकी अपॉइंटमेंट है। क्या आप समय पर आने के लिए तैयार हैं?
rationale: Reminds Riya about her appointment tomorrow at Beauty Lounge by Renu.

body: Ramesh ji, summer demand for ORS (+40%), sunscreen (+38%), and antifungals (+45%) is rising. Cold & cough needs are down 60%. Time to stock up on seasonal essentials!
rationale: Seasonal demand trends for summer essentials

body: Hi Meera, a free IDA webinar on 'Optimizing Fluoride Varnish Recall' is available until May 2nd. It covers new data from JIDA Oct 2026 (N=2100) showing 3-month recalls outperform 6-month for high-risk adults. Given your 124 high-risk adult patients, this could be relevant. Want me to share the registration link?
rationale: CDE opportunity for high-risk adult cohort, citing source & N, with binary CTA.

body: नमस्ते मिस्टर शर्मा, आपकी मेटफॉर्मिन, एटोरवास्टेटिन और टेल्मिसर्टन की दवाएं 28 अप्रैल तक खत्म हो सकती हैं। क्या आप इन्हें अभी रीफिल करना चाहेंगे? हम आपकी सुबह की डिलीवरी के लिए तैयार हैं।
rationale: Chronic refill due for Mr. Sharma, prompting a direct reorder CTA.

body: Hi Vivaan, Dr. Sameer's office here. We noticed it's been about 3 months since your last visit. To maintain your oral health, we recommend scheduling your next check-up. Please let us know if you'd like to book an appointment.
rationale: Re-engagement for chronic refill due based on last visit date.

body: Hi Meera, a new competitor, Smile Studio, just opened 1.3km away in Lajpat Nagar with a ₹199 cleaning offer. Given your high-risk adult cohort and recent CTR dip, this might impact patient acquisition. We can explore strategies to highlight your strengths, like your patient-centric approach mentioned in recent reviews.
rationale: Competitor opened nearby, impacting acquisition. Suggest discussing strategies.

body: Hi Suresh, a new South Indian restaurant just opened near Mylari South Indian Cafe in Indiranagar. In Bangalore, competitors opening nearby can impact visibility. Let's discuss how to keep Mylari South Indian Cafe top-of-mind for your customers. Are you free for a quick chat?
rationale: Addresses competitor opening, offers discussion, uses merchant name.

body: Hi Lakshmi, Studio11 Family Salon! Curious what services are trending with your clients this week? Your views are up 14% and calls 20% in the last 7 days, showing great engagement. Let me know what's popular!
rationale: Addresses merchant directly, references performance signals, and asks an open-ended question.

body: Hi Suresh, I'm curious about how Mylari South Indian Cafe is managing the weekend rush. We've seen 22 positive mentions of your 'thali_quality' recently, but also 3 negative comments about weekend busyness. How are you handling the increased demand on Saturdays and Sundays?
rationale: Addresses merchant's review themes and weekend busyness.

body: Hey Rashmi, it's been 57 days since your last visit. We miss you at PowerHouse Fitness! Remember your focus on weight loss? We've got new equipment and class schedules that might be perfect. Let's get you back on track. Reply YES to reconnect.
rationale: Re-engages lapsed customer Rashmi with a personalized hook and clear CTA.

body: Hi Reyansh, it's been a while since your last visit to Asha Dental Care on April 1st. We wanted to check in and see if you'd like to schedule your next appointment. Let us know if you're interested!
rationale: Re-engage lapsed patient Reyansh with a friendly check-in and open CTA.

body: नमस्ते Reyansh, Daily Care Medicos से। हमें आपकी याद आ रही है! क्या आप अपनी अगली दवा की खरीद के लिए तैयार हैं? हम आपकी मदद के लिए यहाँ हैं।
rationale: Re-engages lapsed customer Reyansh with a direct question about their next purchase.

body: Hi Anjali, it's been 38 days since we last connected. Remember how we discussed subscription expiry? Let's get Glamour Lounge Spa & Salon back on track. What's on your mind for re-engagement?
rationale: Re-engages merchant after 38 days, referencing prior topic.

body: Hi Anand, hope you're having a good week. I noticed your views are down 8% and calls down 21% in the last 7 days. Let's chat about how to get things buzzing again. Are you free for a quick call today?
rationale: Merchant is dormant, performance dip, offer to help

body:
Hi Lakshmi,

Diwali is coming up in 188 days! It's a great time to get ahead on bookings. Your salon is seeing strong engagement, with views up 14% and calls up 20% this past week. Let's plan some special offers to attract clients for the festive season.
rationale: Festival upcoming trigger, relevant to salon, personalized performance data.

body: Hi Pooja, with the upcoming festival, it's a great time to boost member engagement. Our data shows the post-Jan resolution window is closing, with trial walk-ins peaking in the last two weeks. Let's strategize to capture this momentum for Bend & Burn!
rationale: Festival upcoming trigger, connects to closing resolution window & walk-ins.

body: Hi Vikas, your Sunrise Medicos listing is currently unverified. Completing verification via postcard or phone call could boost your views by an estimated 30%. This is important for building trust with customers in Gomti Nagar. Let me know if you'd like to proceed.
rationale: Merchant unverified trigger, explains uplift, asks open question.

body: Hi Suresh, today's DC vs MI match at Arun Jaitley Stadium could be a great opportunity. IPL home-match Saturdays have historically underperformed weeknights, but your locality is eligible. Consider promoting your 'Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free' offer for dine-in or delivery during the match. Your trial ends in 7 days!
rationale: Leverages IPL match trigger, merchant offer, and trial ending soon.

body: Hi Suresh, Mylari South Indian Cafe just hit 145 reviews! You're so close to 150. Keep up the great work with the thali quality, it's really resonating. Let's aim for that next milestone!
rationale: Celebrate milestone, mention review theme, encourage next goal.

body: Hi Mukesh, congrats on reaching 889 unique customers this year! Let's aim for 1000 next. What's your strategy for the next push?
rationale: Congratulates merchant on milestone, asks open-ended question for next goal.

body: Bharat, your practice saw a 50% drop in calls last week compared to your baseline. This dip is significant, especially with your Pro subscription renewal just 12 days away. Let's discuss strategies to boost your visibility and patient engagement. Would you like to explore options?
rationale: Addresses performance dip, renewal, and offers discussion.

body: Hi Sushma, your views are up 8% and calls up 2% in the last 7 days. However, your overall performance dipped slightly last month. Let's chat about how to boost your bookings. Are you free for a quick call?
rationale: Addresses performance dip, highlights positive recent trends, and offers a call.

body: Padma, great news! Your calls spiked 15% in the last 7 days, likely driven by your new kids' yoga post. Your CTR is also up to 0.062. Keep up the momentum!
rationale: Merchant performance spike, specific metric and delta, positive driver mentioned.

body: Hi Vikas, Sunrise Medicos saw a 2% increase in views and a 5% increase in calls last week. Your CTR is 0.041, slightly above the Lucknow average of 0.038. Keep up the great work!
rationale: Merchant performance spike, positive metrics, peer comparison.

body: नमस्ते Priya, आपकी 6 महीने की क्लीनिंग ड्यू है। क्या आप 5 या 6 नवंबर को शाम के स्लॉट में आना चाहेंगी? आप चाहें तो ₹299 की डेंटल क्लीनिंग ऑफर का भी लाभ उठा सकती हैं।
rationale: Personalized recall for Priya with offer and specific slots.

body: Hi Diya, it's been a while since your last visit on April 1st. We miss having you at Zen Yoga Studio! Padma and the team are ready to welcome you back. How about we schedule your next session? Let me know what works for you.
rationale: Personalized recall for lapsed customer Diya, referencing last visit and owner.

body: Hi Dr. Meera, new regulations require updated dental imaging by Dec 15th. This impacts DCI radiographs. Let's ensure compliance. We can discuss options for updating your clinic's equipment or processes.
rationale: Addresses regulation change trigger, specific deadline, and offers discussion.
